revision.text:
[[ja:御霊神社 (藤沢市羽鳥)]] {{Infobox religious building| |Name = {{ill|Mitama Shrine|de=Mitama-Schrein|ja=御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitama Shrine|1=Goryo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489356}} |image = [[File:Hatori mitama shrine,Fujisawa city,Japan.jpg|250px|The Buddhist bell of Hatori Mitama Shrine, cast in 1386]] |Location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa City|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}}{{ill|Hatori (Fujisawa City)|de=Hatori (Fujisawa Stadt)|ja=羽鳥 (藤沢市)|lt=Hatori 3‐chome|lt_ja=羽鳥三丁目|lt_de=Hatori 3‐chome|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatori (Fujisawa City)|1=Hatori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11610402}}15‐28 |Coordinates = {{Wiki Coordinates DMS|35|20|40.90|N|139|27|26.80|E|region:JP-14_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name={{ill|Mitama Shrine|de=Mitama-Schrein|ja=御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitama Shrine|1=Goryo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489356}}}} |Deities = {{ill|Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=高皇産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タカミムスビ|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タカミムスビ|1=Takamimusubi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125400}} (Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami)
{{ill|Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=神皇産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カミムスビ|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カミムスビ|1=Kamimusubi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3275901}} (Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami)
{{ill|Tamatsume‐no‐Kami|de=Tamatsume‐no‐Kami|ja=玉積産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamatsume‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Tamatsume‐no‐Kami)
{{ill|Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=天活玉命|lt=Seisō‐no‐Kami|lt_ja=生産霊神|lt_de=Seisō‐no‐Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami|1=Ame-no-Ikutama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97184246}} (Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami)
{{ill|Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=足産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami) |Physical Form = |Status = |Founded = |Main Hall = |Alternate Name = |Associated Sites = |Annual Festivals = January 1, September 6 |Rituals = |Map = {{Maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|marker=place-of‐worship}}
{{Right|{{Location map|Japan Kanagawa#Japan|label={{ill|Mitama Shrine|de=Mitama-Schrein|ja=御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitama Shrine|1=Goryo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489356}}|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|position=top|width=200|caption=Location of Mitama Shrine ({{ill|Mitama Shrine|de=Mitama-Schrein|ja=御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitama Shrine|1=Goryo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489356}})}}}} }} '''Mitama Shrine''' ({{ill|Goreijinja|de=Goreijinja|ja=御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goreijinja|1=Goryo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489356}}) is a shrine located in {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa City|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}}{{ill|Hatori (Fujisawa City)|de=Hatori (Fujisawa Stadt)|ja=羽鳥 (藤沢市)|lt=Hatori|lt_ja=羽鳥|lt_de=Hatori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatori (Fujisawa City)|1=Hatori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11610402}}. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=高皇産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タカミムスビ|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タカミムスビ|1=Takamimusubi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125400}} (Takamimusubi‐no‐Kami) * {{ill|Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=神皇産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カミムスビ|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カミムスビ|1=Kamimusubi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3275901}} (Kanmimusubi‐no‐Kami) * {{ill|Tamatsume‐no‐Kami|de=Tamatsume‐no‐Kami|ja=玉積産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamatsume‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Tamatsume‐no‐Kami) * {{ill|Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=天活玉命|lt=Seisō‐no‐Kami|lt_ja=生産霊神|lt_de=Seisō‐no‐Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami|1=Ame-no-Ikutama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97184246}} (Ikumusubi‐no‐Kami) * {{ill|Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami|de=Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami|ja=足産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Tarumusubi‐no‐Kami)[http://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=562&cd=1206043&scd=&npg=2 Mitama Shrine] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office, viewed April 8, 2018. == Cultural Properties == ; Designated Cultural Property of Fujisawa City (Crafts) * The Buddhist bell of Mitama Shrine, {{ill|Bonshō|en|Bonshō|qid=Q8192099|lt=Buddhist Bell|1=Bonshō}} - {{ill|1966|en|1966|qid=Q2649|lt=1966|1=1966}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|qid=Q327567|lt=Showa|1=Shōwa era}} 41) {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}} designated[http://www.city.fujisawa.kanagawa.jp/bunkazai/kyoiku/bunka/bunkazai/mokuroku.html Designated Cultural Properties List] - Fujisawa City, viewed April 8, 2018.. It was cast during the {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi period|1=Muromachi period}} in {{ill|1386|en|1386|qid=Q6355|lt=1386|1=1386}} (in the 3rd year of {{ill|Shitoku|en|Shitoku|qid=Q1146202|lt=Shitoku|1=Shitoku}}) and was originally located at {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}’s {{ill|Katori Shrine|en|Katori Shrine|qid=Q372380|lt=Katori Temple|1=Katori Jingū}}, but was purchased in {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ({{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=Meiji 5|1=1872}}) by the villagers of Hatori. File:Bell of Hatori mitama shrine,Fujisawa city,Japan.jpg|Belfry Bell File:Text of the bell of Hatori mitama shrine,Fujisawa city,Japan.jpg|Inscription of Katori Temple on the bell == Festivals == * January 1: New Year's Festival (Saitan‐sai) * September 6: Annual Festival (Reitaisai) == Location Information == ; Address : {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa City|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}}{{ill|Hatori 3‐chome|de=Hatori 3‐chome|ja=羽鳥三丁目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatori 3‐chome|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}15‐28 ; Transportation : {{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|qid=Q499071|lt=JR|1=East Japan Railway Company}} {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|en|Tōkaidō Main Line|qid=Q1190152|lt=Tokaido Main Line|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}} {{ill|Tsujidō Station|en|Tsujidō Station|qid=Q1049779|lt=Tsujido Station|1=Tsujidō Station}}; approximately a 16‐minute walk from the north exit. == Footnotes == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture|de=Liste der Schreine in Kanagawa|ja=神奈川県の神社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office Designated Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11588941}} * {{ill|List of Designated Cultural Properties in Fujisawa City|de=Liste der in Fujisawa ausgewiesenen Kulturdenkmäler|ja=藤沢市指定文化財一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Designated Cultural Properties in Fujisawa City|1=list of Designated Cultural Properties in Fujisawa City|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11624507}} == External Links == * [http://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=562&cd=1206043&scd=&npg=2 Mitama Shrine] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office * [https://yaokami.jp/1140732/ Yaoyorozu no Kami] - Japanese Shrine and Temple Search Site {{Shinto stub}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|御霊神社 (藤沢市羽鳥)|version=99611427|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:御霊神社]] [[de:Mitama-Schrein]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] ==Merged second translation== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Goryō Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Hatori mitama shrine,Fujisawa city,Japan.jpg|250px|Bonshō of Hatori Goryō Shrine, cast in 1386]] |location={{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, [[Fujisawa City]], [[Hatori (Fujisawa City)|3-15-28 Hatori]] |coordinates={{WikidataCoord|35|20|40.90|N|139|27|26.80|E|region:JP-14_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Goryō Shrine}} |Enshrined deity=[[Takami Musubi|Takami Musubi no Kami]]
[[Kami Musubi|Kami Musubi no Kami]]
Tamatsume Musubi no Kami
[[Ame-no-Kaguyama|Ikumusubi no Kami]]
Tarumusubi no Kami |festival=January 1, September 6 |Map={{Maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|marker=place-of-worship}}
{{Right|{{location map|Japan Kanagawa#Japan|label=Goryō Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|position=top|width=200|caption=location of Goryō Shrine}}}} }} '''Goryō Shrine''' (御霊神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in [[Hatori (Fujisawa City)|Hatori]], [[Fujisawa City]], {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. == Enshrined Deities == * [[Takami Musubi|Takami Musubi no Kami]] * [[Kamimusubi|Kami Musubi no Kami]] * Tamatsume Musubi no Kami * [[Ame-no-Kaguyama|Ikumusubi no Kami]] * Tarumusubi no Kami[http://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=562&cd=1206043&scd=&npg=2 Goryō Shrine] - Kanagawa Shrine Association, accessed April 8, 2018. == Cultural Properties == ; Fujisawa City Designated Cultural Properties (Crafts) * Bonshō of Goryō Shrine - Designated on January 17, 1966 ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|qid=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 41).[http://www.city.fujisawa.kanagawa.jp/bunkazai/kyoiku/bunka/bunkazai/mokuroku.html Designated Cultural Properties Catalog] - Fujisawa City, accessed April 8, 2018. The bell, cast in {{ill|1386|en|1386|qid=Q6355|lt=1386|1=1386}} ({{ill|Shitoku|en|Shitoku|qid=Q1146202|lt=Shitoku|1=Shitoku}} 3) during the {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi period|1=Muromachi period}}, originally belonged to [[Katori Jingū|Katori Jingū-ji]] in {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. It was purchased by the residents of Hatori Village in {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ([[Meiji]] 5).[http://www.enopo.jp/fujisawa-guide/chikutanbou/12127-shonanmeiji.html District Exploration (Part 8) Meiji District] - Enopo: Enoshima & Fujisawa Portal Site, accessed April 8, 2018. File:Bell of Hatori mitama shrine,Fujisawa city,Japan.jpg|Bonshō File:Text of the bell of Hatori mitama shrine,Fujisawa city,Japan.jpg|Inscription on the bonshō showing the name Katori Daijingū-ji == Festivals == * January 1 - Saitan-sai (New Year’s Festival) * September 6 - Reitai-sai (festival) == location Information == ; Address : 3-15-28 Hatori, Fujisawa City, Kanagawa Prefecture ; Access : From {{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|qid=Q499071|lt=East Japan Railway Company|1=East Japan Railway Company}} {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|en|Tōkaidō Main Line|qid=Q1190152|lt=Tōkaidō Main Line|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}} {{ill|Tsujidō Station|en|Tsujidō Station|qid=Q1049779|lt=Tsujidō Station|1=Tsujidō Station}}, north exit, approximately 16 minutes on foot. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shinto shrines in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の神社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shinto shrines in Kanagawa|1=Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office Designated Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11588941}} * {{ill|List of designated cultural properties in Fujisawa|ja|藤沢市指定文化財一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of designated cultural properties in Fujisawa|1=list of Designated Cultural Properties in Fujisawa City|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11624507}} == External Links == * [http://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=562&cd=1206043&scd=&npg=2 Goryō Shrine] - Kanagawa Shrine Association * [https://yaokami.jp/1140732/ Yaokami] - Japanese Shrine and Temple Search Site {{shinto-stub}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|御霊神社 (藤沢市羽鳥)|version=99611427|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:御霊神社 (藤沢市羽鳥)]] [[ja:御霊神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153282}} [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Fujisawa]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
